title: 私が姫！プリンセスロードへ爆走です！

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's a dream I've held in my heart since I was a
little girl.

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text: I want to become a princess.

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"A princess is always beautiful, graceful, and
courageous! Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter!"

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text:
I want to become a strong and wonderful
princess, just like Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Hic... Yes, I can... I can become a princess too...

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
No way! Someone like you could never become a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Girl in a One-Piece Dress
text_block_list.text:
Ken's right! There's no way a crybaby like you will
ever be a princess!

text_block_list.name: Boy in a T-shirt
text_block_list.text:
Wah, wah! Little crybaby! Not a single person
thinks you'll become a princess!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Sob... That's not... That's not...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's not true!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Shush up and listen up, all you boys and girls!
What she aspires to is an ideal of her own. You
don't have the right to deny her pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
Wh-who are you? And why'd you just appear out
of nowhere…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll burst! I'll charge! I'll blast out of nowhere if
need be! How dare you mock the dreams of
another person!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stomp! Ka-chuuuunk!

text_block_list.name: Boy in a T-shirt
text_block_list.text: Ack! Sh-she just smashed a crater into the ground!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, it is my duty to restore love into
the hearts of naughty little children who've been
tainted by evil!

text_block_list.name: Young Boys and Girls
text_block_list.text: Aaaahhh! It's the savage Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It's been a while since I heard that.
Everything's okay now, little lady!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: R-right... Um, thank you...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't mention it! It's only natural for a
princess to come to the aid of someone in need!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
By the way, you were saying that you want to
become a princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...You don't have to be afraid anymore. I sent all
those bullies packing.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Plus, you and I are the same. I look up to
princesses, too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Y-you do too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Kawakami Princess talking
happily with a girl in the park.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And then Princess Fighter pins the Dark Princess
down with her powerful legs! Like "KER-BLAM!"

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: ..."Ker-blam?"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, it's Trainer! Would you like to join our
princess chat?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. It's a ceremony where we each speak
passionately about the princesses we admire to
strengthen our aspirations!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As long as you don't lose sight of your goal and
continue to be yourself, then one day, you're sure
to meet people who accept you for who you are.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Be yourself and don't lose sight of your goal...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: See you later, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Let's meet again!
choice_data_list: Seems like you had a deep discussion.
Seems like you had a deep discussion.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want her to give up, so I kind of got
carried away...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There was a time when people told me I couldn't
do it either, you see.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It was a long time ago—before I enrolled at the
academy. I had visited lots of prestigious racing
clubs because I wanted to work out my legs.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Are you taking the enrollment exam for that club
too, Kawakami? Let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text: Yes. It served as the model for the Fire-Foot Club in episode two of Princess Fighter: P♭, so I have to join!

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text:
This time for sure... Third time's the charm, right? No,
wait. This is the fourth time.

text_block_list.name: Club Coach
text_block_list.text:
You don't really fit our criteria. And to be honest,
judging from your attitude...

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Rejected again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Listen, dear. What you want is to become a
princess, right?

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Then what do you have to run for? A princess
needs to be ladylike and well-behaved.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No, she's wrong.

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"What you aspire to is your own! Nobody else has
the right to decide for you!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What I want to be... What I want to become is...

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"A princess is always beautiful, graceful, and
courageous! Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter! A
dreamer's journey never ends!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will be a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if anyone says I don't fit, I'm not the
right type, or that I can't do it! I'm going to be my
own vision of a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I want to obtain a new power, just like Princess
Fighter! I want to be strong enough to win G1
races and claim the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because I've decided to become the strongest
princess! One who won't lose to anyone, no
matter how daunting they are!
choice_data_list: Let's give it our all together!
Let's give it our all together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "Triple Tiara" refers to three G1 races—the
Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.
It can only be attempted during an Umamusume's
classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect stage for a magnificent, fiery
princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, I organize a scrimmage to help
Kawakami Princess get used to running in live
races.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you're watching, Trainer! I'm going to
do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So declaring, Kawakami Princess heads over to
the gate in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can utilize her power efficiently, then this
race should be an easy win. I look on with high
hopes, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urgh... My head...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. I just lightly bumped my head on the
gate. I'm completely fine, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, Kawakami Princess seems
unsteady on her feet. I hurriedly take her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
There's no cause for concern. She's the picture of
health.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Didn't I tell you? I'm totally fine!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're worrying too much, Trainer! I'm going to
go try again, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All right... One, two! One, two! As soon as the gate
opens, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oops, my mistake... The gate totally didn't open
yet...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, I know... It's just... when I think about the
race, my body starts to move on its own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on the situation, it seems Kawakami
Princess gets overexcited at the prospect of a
race, preventing her from performing like normal.
choice_data_list: (...Is this going to work out for her?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Harboring a sliver of doubt, I start thinking about
a method to deal with the issue.
